verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the PM via N-terminal myristoylation/palmitoylation, with its catalytic body facing the cytoplasm. It signals downstream of BCR/FcεRI as a cytosolic effector. Walking the contextual buckets: no documented cancer/cell-death/activation-induced outer-leaflet ecto-pool for LYN itself; no narrow germline/developmental surface display; not a lysosomal TM protein and no lysosomal exocytosis story; no documented PM minority pool on the outer face (its PM pool is inner-leaflet); no wash-resistant tethering to a TM partner exposing it extracellularly. Clinical programs target its kinase activity intracellularly.
